hmac_key_encoding: UTF-8 bytes of the key string above

recomputation_instructions.step_1: Obtain the manifest_digest value from packet_manifest.json
recomputation_instructions.step_2: Encode the manifest digest string as UTF-8 bytes
recomputation_instructions.step_3: Encode the key string 'FORK_PUBLIC_DISCLOSURE_V0_1_1_NON_SECRET_TEST_KEY' as UTF-8 bytes
recomputation_instructions.step_5: Express result as lowercase hex string
recomputation_instructions.step_6: Compare with seal_value above; any difference indicates the sealed manifest digest has changed

_fork_seal_note: This HMAC binds the manifest digest to a declared key. The key is publicly disclosed and carries no confidentiality claim. The seal establishes whether the manifest digest as sealed matches the manifest digest as independently recomputed. It does not establish signer identity, non-repudiation, or institutional authority.
